mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsChargerDao.selectList */ select ubc.bsns_cd , ubc.insider_id , ci.member_nm as insider_nm , ci.position_nm , ubc.charger_author_cd , ubc.reprsnt_charger , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('DEPT_CD', ci.dept_nm) as dept_nm from uspt_bsns_charger ubc inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id where ubc.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd} order by ubc.charger_author_cd desc, ubc.reprsnt_charger
